translation: Remember that you will die.

text: Carpe diem, quam minimum credula postero.
translation: Seize the day, put very little trust in tomorrow.
Love of fate.
Through hardships to the stars.
While I breathe, I hope.
I came, I saw, I conquered.
Dare to know.
I think, therefore I am.
Time flies.
Art is long, life is short.
To err is human.
Fortune favors the bold.
Deeds, not words.
To the stars through difficulties.
Thus passes the glory of the world.
The truth shall set you free.
Make haste slowly.

text: Dulce et decorum est pro patria mori.
translation: It is sweet and fitting to die for one's country.
I am not led, I lead.
The die is cast.

text: L'essentiel est invisible pour les yeux.
translation: What is essential is invisible to the eyes.
One must imagine Sisyphus happy.
To understand all is to forgive all.
I think, therefore I am.
Beauty will save the world.
Hell is other people.

text: On ne voit bien qu'avec le cœur.
translation: It is only with the heart that one can see rightly.

text: Le cœur a ses raisons que la raison ne connaît point.
translation: The heart has its reasons which reason knows nothing of.

text: Rien ne se perd, rien ne se crée, tout se transforme.
translation: Nothing is lost, nothing is created, everything is transformed.

text: Le courage n'est pas l'absence de peur, mais la capacité de vaincre ce qui fait peur.
translation: Courage is not the absence of fear, but the ability to overcome what frightens.
Who lives will see. (Time will tell.)

text: Après la pluie, le beau temps.
translation: After the rain, good weather.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
Dumplings rather than flowers. (Substance over style.)
One time, one meeting. (Treasure every encounter.)
After rain, the ground hardens. (Adversity builds strength.)
Three years on a stone. (Patience pays off.)
There is fortune in leftovers. (Good things come to those who wait.)

text: 井の中の蛙大海を知らず.
translation: A frog in a well does not know the great sea.
Even monkeys fall from trees. (Everyone makes mistakes.)

text: 武士は食わねど高楽枝.
translation: A samurai uses a toothpick even when he hasn't eaten. (Keep your dignity.)

text: Wer kämpft, kann verlieren. Wer nicht kämpft, hat schon verloren.
translation: He who fights can lose. He who doesn't fight has already lost.

text: Die Grenzen meiner Sprache bedeuten die Grenzen meiner Welt.
translation: The limits of my language mean the limits of my world.

text: Was mich nicht umbringt, macht mich stärker.
translation: What does not kill me makes me stronger.

text: Man muss noch Chaos in sich haben, um einen tanzenden Stern gebären zu können.
translation: One must still have chaos in oneself to give birth to a dancing star.
The journey is the destination.
Knowledge is power.
Practice makes perfect.
The morning hour has gold in its mouth. (The early bird catches the worm.)

text: لا تؤجل عمل اليوم إلى الغد.
translation: Do not postpone today's work to tomorrow.
Knowledge is light.
Patience is the key to relief.
The mind is an adornment.
He who strives shall find.
A book is read by its title. (You can judge by first impressions.)

text: إذا هبّت رياح التغيير فابنِ طواحين لا جدرانا.
translation: When the winds of change blow, build windmills, not walls.

text: Chi va piano, va sano e va lontano.
translation: He who goes slowly, goes safely and goes far.

text: Dopo la pioggia viene il sereno.
translation: After the rain comes clear sky.

text: La vita è troppo breve per bere vini mediocri.
translation: Life is too short to drink mediocre wine.

text: Tra il dire e il fare c'è di mezzo il mare.
translation: Between saying and doing lies the sea.
He who sleeps catches no fish.
The habit does not make the monk. (Don't judge by appearances.)
By making mistakes, one learns.

text: Не всё то золото, что блестит.
translation: Not all that glitters is gold.
The quieter you go, the further you'll get.
Friends are known in trouble.
The morning is wiser than the evening. (Sleep on it.)
Devils lurk in still waters.

text: El que no arriesga, no gana.
translation: He who doesn't risk, doesn't win.

text: No hay mal que por bien no venga.
translation: There is no bad from which good does not come.
Better late than never.

text: En boca cerrada no entran moscas.
translation: Flies don't enter a closed mouth. (Silence is golden.)

text: Dime con quién andas, y te diré quién eres.
translation: Tell me who you walk with, and I'll tell you who you are.

text: No por mucho madrugar amanece más temprano.
translation: No matter how early you rise, you can't make the sun come up sooner.
Every master has his own little book. (Everyone has their own way.)
Starting is half the task.
At the end of hardship comes happiness.
Other people's rice cakes always look bigger.
Go to the source. (Get to the root of the problem.)

text: Quem não tem cão, caça com gato.
translation: He who has no dog, hunts with a cat. (Make do with what you have.)

text: Água mole em pedra dura, tanto bate até que fura.
translation: Soft water on hard stone, strikes until it bores through.
He who doesn't risk, doesn't snack. (Nothing ventured, nothing gained.)

text: ทำดีได้ดี ทำชั่วได้ชั่ว.
translation: Do good, receive good. Do evil, receive evil.

text: ช้าสุดซ้ายสุด คือคนที่อดทน.
translation: The slowest elephant is the most enduring.
There is victory beyond defeat.
Where there's a will, there's a way.

text: कर्म करो, फल की चिंता मत करो.
translation: Do your work, do not worry about the results.
Know thyself.
Nothing in excess.
Everything flows.
The unexamined life is not worth living.
Life is short and art is long.
I know that I know nothing.

text: Kto rano wstaje, temu Pan Bóg daje.
translation: God gives to those who wake up early.

text: Nie mów hop, póki nie przeskoczysz.
translation: Don't say 'hop' until you've jumped over.
A person learns their whole life.
Under the shade of a big tree. (Find shelter with the powerful.)

text: Có công mài sắt có ngày nên kim.
translation: If you grind iron long enough, it becomes a needle.
Learn, learn more, learn forever.
Wisdom is not in age, but in the head.
Drop by drop, a lake forms.

text: Bir elin nesi var, iki elin sesi var.
translation: One hand has nothing, two hands have sound. (Teamwork.)

text: A buen entendedor, pocas palabras bastan.
translation: For a good listener, few words are enough.

text: რაც თავად გასცე, სხვას იმას მიანიჭებ.
translation: What you give away, you keep; what you keep, you lose.
attribution: Shota Rustaveli, The Knight in the Panther's Skin

translation: He who abandons his culture is a slave.
Hurry hurry has no blessing. (Haste makes waste.)
A person is people. (I am because we are.)
Slowly is the way to go.
There is no wisdom like the wisdom of experience.
Then we were like dreamers.
No one is a prophet in their own land.
Fortune favors the brave.
In wine, there is truth.
There is no disputing about tastes.
He who is silent is seen to consent.
We learn not for school, but for life.
He conquers who conquers himself.

text: Le bonheur est parfois caché dans l'inconnu.
translation: Happiness is sometimes hidden in the unknown.

text: La liberté commence où l'ignorance finit.
translation: Freedom begins where ignorance ends.

text: Vivre, c'est s'obstiner à achever un souvenir.
translation: To live is to persist in completing a memory.

text: Chaque homme porte la forme entière de l'humaine condition.
translation: Every man bears the whole form of the human condition.

text: Nur wer seinen eigenen Weg geht, kann von niemandem überholt werden.
translation: Only he who goes his own way can never be overtaken.

text: Wer mit Ungeheuern kämpft, mag zusehn, dass er nicht dabei zum Ungeheuer wird.
translation: He who fights with monsters should see to it that he does not become a monster.

text: Die Welt ist so schön und wert, dass man um sie kämpft.
translation: The world is so beautiful and worth fighting for.

text: Wer immer strebend sich bemüht, den können wir erlösen.
translation: He who strives on and lives to strive, can earn redemption still.
Beauty is power.
Time flies like an arrow.
Flower, bird, wind, moon. (The beauty of nature.)
The beauty of impermanence and imperfection.
A reason for being.
Where there's smoke, there's fire.

text: A esperança é a última que morre.
translation: Hope is the last to die.
Living life is not like crossing a field.
Beauty will save the world.
Man — that has a proud ring to it.
Habits formed at three last until eighty.
The deeper the water, the quieter it is. (Still waters run deep.)
He who rests, rusts.
Man plans, God finishes.

text: Vägen till helvetet är kantad med goda föresatser.
translation: The road to hell is paved with good intentions.
Your right is to action alone, never to its fruits.
The world is one family.
Non-violence is the highest virtue.
Nature is the creator of art.
This too shall pass.
Standing on the shoulders of giants.
